history.summary: Second run today — searched CPA networks, cashback platforms (EU/APAC), Nordic/LATAM GEOs, push/pop/native traffic sources via RichAds/ROIads roundups, AffLIFT, and Affpaying. Strongest new AN find: Zeydoo (sweepstakes/utilities, 200+ GEOs, 2.5M daily conversions) and ShopBack (APAC cashback giant, $350M raised). Strongest new TS find: Zeropark (pop/domain redirect/commerce media). Run 1 (07:30 UTC) added 5 AN + 6 TS; Run 2 (this run) adds 6 AN + 2 TS.

affiliate_networks.name: MyLead
affiliate_networks.description: Polish-based CPA network active since 2014, ~850K affiliates across 154 countries with ~5,000 offers. Multiple payment models (CPL, CPS, CPA, PPI, COD) and partners with Amazon, Microsoft, AliExpress.

affiliate_networks.name: Indoleads
affiliate_networks.description: Kuala-Lumpur HQ premium affiliate network with 3,000+ programs covering 180+ countries. Local offices in Brazil, India, Hong Kong, Russia, Vietnam. eCPM ~$9.7 for any traffic.

affiliate_networks.name: TerraLeads
affiliate_networks.description: Self-described 'CPA Hub' — runs in-house products (mostly nutra/health) so payouts and inventory are exclusive. Daily withdrawals, multilingual 24/7 personal managers.

affiliate_networks.name: Wildfire
affiliate_networks.description: B2B cashback / rewards / commerce-intelligence platform — gives publishers an API to add cashback functionality. Powers rewards programs for fintechs and loyalty apps.

affiliate_networks.name: Loyalize
affiliate_networks.description: Cashback-as-a-service API + AI-ready rewards platform — like Wildfire, lets you bolt cashback onto an existing site/app. Newer, leaner alternative.

affiliate_networks.name: MaxBounty
affiliate_networks.description: One of the oldest and most trusted CPA networks, founded 2004. 3,000+ active campaigns across finance, health, dating, software verticals. Known for reliable weekly payments and strong AM support.

affiliate_networks.name: Zeydoo
affiliate_networks.description: Tech-first CPA network with 10 in-house products and ~1,000 offers in sweepstakes, mobile apps/utilities, leadgen, and surveys. 200+ GEOs, 5,000+ partners, 2.5M daily conversions.
affiliate_networks.source: Technoven Zeydoo vs MaxBounty comparison + Affpaying

affiliate_networks.name: AdCombo
affiliate_networks.description: International CPA network founded 2013 with 2,400+ exclusive in-house offers. Covers iGaming, crypto, dating, nutra, sweepstakes. Localized in 40+ languages, pays twice weekly from $50.

affiliate_networks.name: LetyShops
affiliate_networks.description: Popular cashback service with millions of users in Europe, LATAM, and Asia, partnering with thousands of online stores. Backed by Admitad owner ($3M investment). Affiliate program pays 50% of LetyShops' income from referred users (lifetime).

affiliate_networks.name: Mobidea
affiliate_networks.description: Mobile-first CPA network founded 2011 with AI-powered Smartlinks that auto-route traffic to highest-converting offer per device/GEO/carrier. Covers leadgen, mVAS, dating, CC nutra, apps. 1,500+ offers, weekly payouts from €50.

affiliate_networks.name: ShopBack
affiliate_networks.description: APAC's dominant cashback and rewards platform — Singapore HQ, 10,000+ merchant partners, $350M+ VC funding. Users earn 1-30% back on purchases via web or app extension.
affiliate_networks.geo: APAC (Singapore, Australia, Taiwan, Malaysia, Philippines, etc.)

traffic_sources.name: ROIads
traffic_sources.description: Newer ad network (launched early 2023), 600M+ daily impressions, focused on just two formats — push and popunder — with very low CPCs ($0.003 floor). Strong on betting & iGaming.

traffic_sources.name: EvaDav
traffic_sources.description: Self-serve performance ad network with 10B+ monthly push notifications across 250 GEOs. Handles betting, finance, crypto, software verticals. Clean UI, well-rated support.

traffic_sources.name: OnClickA
traffic_sources.description: Self-serve global ad network founded 2020. Delivers 2B+ daily in-page impressions across 240 GEOs from direct sources. Strong in iGaming and Dating verticals.

traffic_sources.name: TwinRed
traffic_sources.description: Operating since 2013, originally adult-vertical-only but now widely used for betting / sweepstakes / gaming. Tier-1 + Tier-2 traffic, AI optimization, 4 formats.

traffic_sources.name: Mondiad
traffic_sources.description: Performance ad network mentioned alongside ROIads/EvaDav in 2026 push and popunder roundups. Focus on push, native, and pop formats for affiliate verticals.

traffic_sources.name: Taboola
traffic_sources.description: One of the two giants of native advertising (with Outbrain) — premium publisher inventory, tier-1 traffic. Higher minimums but converts well for cashback / shopping content.

traffic_sources.name: Zeropark
traffic_sources.description: Reliable performance ad network built on pop, domain redirect, and commerce media ads. Strong traffic quality, consistent volume, responsive account managers. Good for testing and scaling.
traffic_sources.source: RichAds Zeropark alternatives article + G2 reviews

traffic_sources.name: TrafficStars
traffic_sources.description: RTB-powered ad network established 2014, went through a 2019 rebrand. Offers push, clickunder, and banner formats with Optimizer and Automated Rules tools. One of the cheapest CPM options for push and clickunder traffic.
